ddls:
CREATE TABLE "compression_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compression setting */,
  "element_size" INTEGER /* Size of the element type in bytes */,
  "num_elements" INTEGER /* Number of elements in the data buffer */,
  "alignment_size" INTEGER /* Buffer alignment size in bytes */,
  "compression_level" INTEGER /* Level of compression to apply */,
  "shuffle_type" INTEGER /* Type of shuffle to apply to the data */,
  "thread_count" INTEGER /* Number of threads to use for compression */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the setting */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this setting is the default one */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compression_settings_alignment_size FOREIGN KEY ("alignment_size") REFERENCES buffer_alignment ("alignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compression_settings_shuffle_type FOREIGN KEY ("shuffle_type") REFERENCES shuffle_types ("shuffle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compression_settings_element_size FOREIGN KEY ("element_size") REFERENCES element_sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compression_settings_compression_level FOREIGN KEY ("compression_level") REFERENCES compression_levels ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compression_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compression level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the compression level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compression level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the level was last updated */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this level is the default one */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shuffle_types" (
  "shuffle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shuffle type */,
  "shuffle_name" TEXT /* Name of the shuffle type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shuffle type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shuffle type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the shuffle type was last updated */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this shuffle type is the default one */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shuffle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buffer_alignment" (
  "alignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alignment size */,
  "alignment_size" INTEGER /* Size of the buffer alignment in bytes */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alignment size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alignment size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alignment size was last updated */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this alignment size is the default one */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alignment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "element_sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each element size */,
  "element_size" INTEGER /* Size of the element type in bytes */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the element size */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the element size was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the element size was last updated */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this element size is the default one */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_buffers" (
  "buffer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data buffer */,
  "buffer_name" TEXT /* Name of the data buffer */,
  "data_type" INTEGER /* Type of data stored in the buffer */,
  "num_elements" INTEGER /* Number of elements in the buffer */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the compression setting used for the buffer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the buffer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the buffer was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the buffer is currently active */,
  "last_accessed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the buffer was last accessed */,
  "compression_ratio" REAL /* The compression ratio of the buffer */,
  "storage_size" INTEGER /* The size of the buffer after compression */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buffer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_buffers_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES compression_settings ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_buffers_data_type FOREIGN KEY ("data_type") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data type was last updated */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this data type is the default one */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compression_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the compression setting */,
  "compression_ratio" REAL /* Compression ratio achieved */,
  "processing_time" REAL /* Time taken to compress the data */,
  "memory_usage" REAL /* Memory used during compression */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the performance metric was last updated */,
  "is_optimized" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the performance metric is from an optimized setting */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Description of the test environment where the performance was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compression_performance_setting_id FOREIGN KEY ("setting_id") REFERENCES compression_settings ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data engineer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "buffer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data buffer being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the buffer */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the buffer was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log was last updated */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client accessing the buffer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_buffer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buffer_id") REFERENCES data_buffers ("buffer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of the permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this role is the default one */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role association */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role association was last updated */,
  "is_primary" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this is the primary role for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
